text: {"acknowledges_specifics":true,"no_unverifiable_promise":true,"states_next_steps":true,"invents_no_policy":true,"consistent_with_gold":false,"within_length":true,"justification":"It references the $1,200 ACH from April 6 and the 6-day delay, makes no guarantees, explains it will be sent to payments ops and that they’ll follow up, and stays concise without inventing policies, but it fails to commit to a 24-hour follow-up as required by the gold notes."}
